<?php namespace League\MimeTypeDetection; class OverridingExtensionToMimeTypeMap implements ExtensionToMimeTypeMap { /** * @var ExtensionToMimeTypeMap */ private $innerMap; /** * @var string[] */ private $overrides; /** * @param array<string, string> $overrides */ public function __construct(ExtensionToMimeTypeMap $innerMap, array $overrides) { $this->innerMap = $innerMap; $this->overrides = $overrides; } public function lookupMimeType(string $extension): ?string { return $this->overrides[$extension] ?? $this->innerMap->lookupMimeType($extension); } }
